name: Voice Memo → Blog Draft
description: Turns a rambling voice memo into a structured blog post draft. For the ideas you can talk through in two minutes but never find time to write down.
prompt_template: Take the voice memo or rough notes I give you and turn them into a blog post draft. Keep my point and my voice from my brain, organize it with a clear opening, a few sections, and a closing thought, and clean up the rambling without making it sound stiff. Suggest a title or two. Give it to me as a draft I can edit before publishing.
